git.tag_owner_note: Run scripts/verify-v0.3.3-alpha-publication.py --expected-sha <tag-target-sha> immediately before pushing the tag. Refresh git.sha if the merge strategy changes the tag target.

public.title: org/team status and private-pack access diagnostics

private_registry.title: organization, team, namespace, membership, and governance model
admin console organization and team governance MVP

distribution.pypi_deferral: PyPI is not the supported v0.3.3-alpha distribution path because router skills, installers, schemas, docs, and repo assets must be present beside the checkout.

registry_signing_status.note: Fixture manifests use local test keys only. Release owner must update this status before broad production release.

feature_scope: org status local cache and registered refresh boundary
cross-repo private registry org/team namespace fixture E2E
v0.3.3-alpha org/team governance release smoke and verifier
known_limitations: Developer preview, not a production SLA.
PyPI is not the supported v0.3.3-alpha distribution path.
org status --refresh requires hosted registry support for /v1/org/status.
Private team pack hosted operations require registry-side entitlement or Business/Enterprise plan.
Support bundle output is redacted and local; users decide whether to share it.
release_owner_actions: Review and merge required public and private registry PRs in dependency order.
Refresh git.sha if the merge strategy changes the final tag target.
Create tag v0.3.3-alpha only after human release-owner approval.
Create a GitHub prerelease with docs/releases/v0.3.3-alpha.md as release notes.
